electroacoustic.components: LF: 1x 12-inch weather-resistant transducer; HF: 1x 3-inch diaphragm compression driver, coaxially mounted in a bass-reflex tuned cabinet
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 133 dB peak at 1 m, free field, 10 dB crest-factor pink noise with [12XTA_FI] preset
electroacoustic.frequency_range_note: 55 Hz - 20 kHz at -10 dB with [12XTA_FR] preset; extends to 32 Hz in HIGH-PASS mode paired with an SB18

operating_modes: HIGH-PASS (100 Hz high-pass for SB18 pairing)
amplification.drive_note: In active mode each enclosure consumes two amp channels (separate LF and HF feeds). On an LA4/LA4X the first two enclosures take output channels 1 and 3, with a second unit paralleled on each, for up to four active 12XT per controller; resources are optimized for two or four units. Active RMS handling: LF 290 W, HF 135 W with [12XTA_FI].

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), wired in parallel for IN/LINK daisy-chaining; in active wiring 1+/1- carry LF and 2+/2- carry HF
connection.cables: L-ACOUSTICS SP.7 / SP10 / SP25 4-conductor loudspeaker cables (4 mm2 / 11 AWG)

physical.cabinet: 18, 24 and 30 mm Baltic birch plywood, grey-brown RAL 8019 finish, powder-coated steel grille with Airnet acoustically transparent cloth
physical.weather_resistance: weather-resistant LF transducer; cabinet not for prolonged moisture exposure
physical.active_passive_switch: active/passive mode selected by a switch behind the logo-side handle

modes: stacked / floor wedge monitor with 30 degrees or 60 degrees fixed wedge angles
wall or ceiling mounted with ETR12-2 bracket
wall or ceiling mounted with Omnimount 120.0 Series (four M8 inserts)

usage: Mid-size 90-degree coaxial box for multi-purpose reinforcement; in active 2-way mode reserve two amp channels per cabinet (one LF, one HF) rather than the single channel a passive 12XT needs.

A single LA4/LA4X powers up to four active 12XT, with the first pair on channels 1 and 3 and a second unit paralleled onto each; plan stage counts in multiples of two or four to keep amp resources balanced.

Pick the preset to match the job: FR for FOH front-fill, FI for flat-response speech/distributed fills, MO for floor-monitor (half-space) duty, using the wedge cabinet's 30/60-degree angles for short or long throw.
When bottom-end is needed, switch to the HIGH-PASS (_100) presets and pair one active 12XT with one SB18 to extend the system down to 32 Hz.
Toggle the active/passive switch behind the handle before connecting; active mode lets the LA4/LA4X manage crossover, time-alignment, EQ and protection instead of the onboard passive network.
Discontinued archive product (no longer manufactured) - verify legacy LA4/LA4X firmware holds the 12XTA preset library before deployment.
